title: Meta AI agent goes rogue, leaks sensitive company and user data in major internal security breach: Report
snippet: A rogue Meta AI agent exposed certain data to unauthorized employees after responding to a technical query without permission, as per a latest report. The incident is said to have lasted two hours and was classified as 'Sev 1' severity by the company.

title: Elon Musk's X limits ‘dislike button’ to verified users to curb spam bots
snippet: In a post on the platform, Musk said: “To prevent spam bot attacks, the dislike button will be for subscribers/verified accounts only.”

title: Decision on 6G spectrum to be taken by ITU & 3GPP post standard setting
snippet: Decision on 6G spectrum to be taken by ITU & 3GPP post standard setting

title: Elon Musk’s X restores services following outage that blocked feeds for thousands
snippet: Many users complained that the app and website were not working properly. According to the outage tracking website Downdetector, more than 2,533 users in India reported problems around 8.19 pm IST.

title: Mint Explainer | Why Nvidia is rewriting its trillion-dollar AI playbook
snippet: After over three years of doubling down on training artificial intelligence, Nvidia's new chips will now be optimized to run AI. Does this make any difference?

title: 'I can't imagine life without…': Tim Cook shuts down retirement rumors
snippet: Apple CEO Tim Cook has opened up about his retirement rumors. Cook, in a recent interview, said that he can't imagine life without Apple.&nbsp;

title: OpenAI VP hints ChatGPT ‘unlimited’ era may be coming to an end: ‘Just doesn't make sense…’
snippet: OpenAI's Head of ChatGPT suggests a potential overhaul of the subscription model. Nick Turley states that we might be heading towards the end of flat-rate monthly plans due to increasing resource demands of AI models.

title: Apple releases its first-ever Background Security Improvements update: What is it, how to download and more
snippet: Apple has introduced its first Background Security Improvement (BSI) update. This new system offers lightweight security patches for recent iOS, iPadOS, and macOS versions

title: OpenAI upgrades ChatGPT free tier with faster GPT-5.4 Mini, adds new 'subagent' capabilities

title: Heavy social media usage erodes young people's wellbeing, report finds
snippet: Already, ​a number of countries across the world are working on plans to curb children's social media access after Australia in December became the world's first country to ban social media for children under 16.

title: US agency asks companies to secure Microsoft tool after Stryker cyberattack
snippet: The March 11 cyberattack hit Stryker's computer systems, causing widespread ‌disruption to ⁠its ⁠business, including its ability to process orders, make products ​and ship them to customers. The company said it had ​experienced a global disruption to its Microsoft environment.

title: Apple's China smartphone sales jump 23% to start 2026, bucking industry trend
snippet: China's overall smartphone market fell 4% year-on-year in the January-to-early-March period, with government subsidies ‌introduced at the ⁠start ⁠of the year doing little to revive sluggish consumer demand, data on Thursday from research ​firm Counterpoint showed.

title: Bridgewater's chief scientist Sekhon to join Google's DeepMind AI unit
snippet: Sekhon, who served as chief scientist and head of AI, will join Bridgewater's board of directors after leaving his current roles there, according to a post by ‌Hassabis on LinkedIn.

title: Uni’s valuation cut; Howard Morgan on AI, venture investing, more
snippet: Happy Thursday! Fintech startup Uni is staring at a steep valuation cut as it looks to raise fresh capital amid regulatory headwinds. This and more in today’s ETtech Morning Dispatch.

title: Semicon ecosystem players seek sops to meet chip goals
snippet: Companies related to semiconductors have sought financial incentives, such as capital subsidies and rebates on power and taxes, to help achieve the stated goals of the second phase of the India Semiconductor Mission (ISM), underscoring the criticality of building a broader ecosystem beyond fabs.

title: Scoop: Credit card startup Uni eyes fresh funds at over 70% valuation cut amid RBI curbs
snippet: Bengaluru-based Uniorbit Technologies, the parent company of Uni Cards, has so far raised $104 million across multiple rounds from investors. These included $70 million it raised in a Series A round led by General Catalyst during the 2021 go-go funding cycle.

title: Exclusive: AI boom due for correction, strongest firms will endure: First Round Capital cofounder Howard Morgan
snippet: In venture investing there are two ways to make money—buy low and sell high, or buy high and sell higher. In a bubble, everybody thinks buy high, sell higher works forever.
